title: v0.1.0 - Initial Release
description: Ship It Clean. Stable, beautiful, intuitive first impression. A user installs the plugin, opens a project, and immediately understands the workflow without reading docs. Core workflows solid, test coverage in place, onboarding experience polished.

title: v0.2.0 - Polish & Testing
description: Spec Intelligence. Features no other OpenSpec tool has. Code-to-spec traceability via gutter markers, spec coverage indicators, inline quick-fixes, change diff viewer. This is the moat that differentiates us from every VS Code extension.

title: v0.3.0 - Advanced Features
description: Ecosystem and Publishing. JetBrains Marketplace listing, engagement with OpenSpec/Fission AI for official integration status, multi-project support, local AI via Ollama, streaming responses. Community adoption and visibility.
